title: Automation to Link Location and Status
excerpt: I can’t find a way to automate a Location to be assigned with a Status. I have my Job Names as a Status, so when a Job Name is selected i’d like a Location to be linked to that task. Is this possible as an automation or …

posts.author: Trademark1 (Abe B)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t find a way to automate a Location to be assigned with a Status. I have my Job Names as a Status, so when a Job Name is selected i’d like a Location to be linked to that task. Is this possible as an automation or even an integrations?
